problem_solved: Health plans and providers need integrated platforms to manage population health and coordinate care across medical and social services
solution_description: Population health management platform with SDOH integration capabilities. Provides care management, utilization management, and analytics for value-based care. Includes social determinants data integration and community resource connections. Serves Medicare Advantage, Medicaid, and commercial populations
traction_signals: Serves Medicare Advantage and Medicaid plans
notes: Population health platform with SDOH capabilities. High Varden fit - integrates SDOH into population health management. Strong in value-based care. Less well-known than competitors but established player in payer market
